task_completion.description: Verify the SRS document is opened in ReqView.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ReqView application is open and the 'SRS' document is selected in the document pane or visible in the main view.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to requirement SRS-001.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Requirement 'SRS-001' is visible in the main document view and is selected or focused.

task_completion.description: Verify the text 'NEED-001' is selected in the description of SRS-001.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'NEED-001' within the description field of requirement SRS-001 is highlighted, indicating it has been selected for hyperlink creation.

task_completion.description: Verify an inline hyperlink is created pointing to NEED-001.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A hyperlink dialog is open with the target set to 'NEED-001' (or the NEEDS document), OR the text 'NEED-001' is styled as a hyperlink (e.g., blue and underlined) with a tooltip or link indicator showing it points to NEED-001.
The 'Save' button is clicked, the File -> Save menu item is triggered, or the project title bar no longer shows an unsaved changes indicator (like an asterisk).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the ReqView graphical user interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the ReqView application window, menus, and dialogs, rather than a text editor modifying JSON files directly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are visible executing commands like 'sed', 'python', or 'echo' to modify the project files in the background.

integrity.description: Verify the link was created using the application's built-in linking features.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses ReqView's rich text editor toolbar or link dialog to create the link, rather than manually typing raw HTML/Markdown tags into a plain text field.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target requirement ID to modify is 'SRS-001'. The specific text to be hyperlinked in its description is 'NEED-001'.
